name: Delta SkyMiles® Platinum Business American Express Card
title: Delta SkyMiles® Platinum Business American Express Card (American Express)
text:
Card: Delta SkyMiles® Platinum Business American Express Card (American Express)
BEST FOR BUSINESS OWNERS WHO FLY DELTA AND WANT A MID-TIER CARD
Pros: First checked bag free on Delta flights for the cardholder and up to 8 companions on the same reservation,Zone 5 Priority Boarding,Fast-track to Medallion status with spending
Cons: $350 annual fee
Why we chose it: The Delta SkyMiles Platinum Business American Express card is a solid mid-tier Delta card. The higher annual fee is offset by added benefits such as an annual companion certificate and the opportunity to earn Medallion Qualification Dollars (MQDs) toward elite status through spending. And, as with other Delta cobranded cards, cardmembers save 15% when booking Delta-operated flights with miles. (Partner offer)
Who it's good for: Delta flyers who don’t mind paying an annual fee of $350 can benefit from this card’s well-rounded perks. If you’re trying to reach elite status with Delta, this card boosts your MQDs by awarding 1 MQD for every $20 you spend. When combined with flights on Delta and partner airlines, this can unlock Medallion status — or push you into higher tiers.
Annual fee: $350
Recommended credit: 670-850
Rewards: 1.5X miles
Intro bonus: Limited Time Offer: Earn 100,000 Bonus Miles after spending $8,000 in purchases on your new Card in your first 6 months of Card Membership. Offer ends 4/1/26.
Points valuation: 1.25
Limited time: Limited-Time Offer
APR: 29.99% Variable,19.49% - 28.49% Variable
Transfer partners: This card earns Amex points
Review: https://thepointsguy.com/guide/platinum-delta-skymiles-business-card-review/
